title: senecio sangayensis
intro: Senecio sangayensis, also known as Sangay ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Senecio sangayensis include its ability to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, Senecio sangayensis is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is sometimes combined with other plants to enhance its medicinal properties.
